zh.lifeSummary: 當Marthe de Quesnel於大約1035年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆勒 可斯爾時，她的父親Robert de Quesnel I34歲，母親Julie de Fouquescourt19歲。她於1050年與Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1089年在法國皮卡迪索姆漢姆享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marthe de Quesnel于大约1035年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆勒 可斯爾时，她的父亲Robert de Quesnel I34岁，母亲Julie de Fouquescourt19岁。她于1050年与Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1089年在法国皮卡迪索姆漢姆享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Quesnel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Aime, Alcide, Yves, Aurel, Aurele, Euclide, Jacques, Josee, Marcel.

French: topographic name derived from Norman, Picard quesne ‘oak tree’, or a habitational name from (Le) Quesnel, the name of several places in the north of France, named from the same word. Compare Canell and Quesnell .
History: Olivier Quesnel from Bayeux in Calvados, France, married Catherine Prudhomme (Louis and Roberte Gadois) in Montreal, QC, in 1680.

variants.name: Quesnell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Amie, Emile.

variants.name: Canell
meanings: Altered form of French   Quesnel   and possibly also of   Canel  . Compare   Cannell  .

nameMeanings.name: Marthe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Marta
meanings: contracted form of Märeta, an obsolete variant of Merete . The name is also popular in Sweden.

variants.name: Marte
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

variants.name: Martha
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marthe de Quesnel was born about 1035, in Le Quesnel, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Robert de Quesnel I, was 34 and her mother, Julie de Fouquescourt, was 19. She married Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup in 1050. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1089, in Ham, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marthe de Quesnel est née environ 1035, à Le Quesnel, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Robert de Quesnel I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Julie de Fouquescourt, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup en 1050. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1089, à Ham, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marthe de Quesnel um 1035 in Le Quesnel, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Quesnel I 34 und ihre Mutter Julie de Fouquescourt 19. Sie hat 1050 Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1089 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Ham, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marthe de Quesnel è nata il circa 1035 nel Le Quesnel, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Quesnel I, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Julie de Fouquescourt, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup nel 1050. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1089, nel Ham, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marthe de Quesnelが約1035年にフランスピカーディソンメル クエスネルで生まれた時，父Robert de Quesnel Iは34歳，母Julie de Fouquescourtは19歳であった。1050年にEudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loupと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1089年にフランスピカーディソンメハムで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marthe de Quesnel(이)가 대략 1035년 프랑스 피카디 솜 일 크스넬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Quesnel I(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julie de Fouquescourt(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1050년 Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1089년 프랑스 피카디 솜 함에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1035–about 1089: tany ho any amin'ny 1035–tany ho any amin'ny 1089

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marthe de Quesnel nasceu aproximadamente 1035, em Le Quesnel, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Robert de Quesnel I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Julie de Fouquescourt, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup em 1050. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1089, em Ham, Somme, Picardie, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marthe de Quesnel родилась около 1035 г. в местности л куеснель, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Quesnel I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Julie de Fouquescourt, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup в 1050 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1089 г. в местности хам, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

sm.about 1035–about 1089: e tusa o le 1035–e tusa o le 1089

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marthe de Quesnel nació aproximadamente 1035, en Le Quesnel, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Robert de Quesnel I, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Julie de Fouquescourt, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Eudes de Vermandois II, Pied De Loup en 1050. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1089, en Ham, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
